target.name: Prion protein
target.prediction_scope: Preview-first reference. Folded object would be one PrP chain: a disordered N-terminal region plus a small helical C-terminal domain. The pathogenic PrP-Sc conversion is not predicted.
target.omitted_context: Reference preview is 1QLX chain A only. The flexible N-terminus should read low pLDDT; the dangerous mechanism here (one sequence refolding into an infectious beta-rich state) is invisible to a single structure prediction.
